entry.title: New: RES25-193 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE DIRECTOR OF BUDGET AND FISCAL SERVICES TO ISSUE AND SELL NOT TO EXCEED $230,000,000 PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF WASTEWATER SYSTEM REVENUE BONDS, SENIOR SERIES 2025 AND RELATED MATTERS.

Recommendation of the adoption of the Resolution authorizing the issuance and sale of a not to exceed principal amount of Wastewater System Revenue Bonds.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
